name: Git Branch Linux
description: Bash snippet that validates a branch name, updates clean main before branching, or moves dirty main work onto the new branch before rebasing it from updated main.
content:
git_new_branch() {
  raw_branch_name="$(cat <<'ESPANSR_BRANCH_NAME:9E6F0F0D_8EAD_45C4_9B3F_5A64E71F7C8D'
{{branch_name}}
ESPANSR_BRANCH_NAME:9E6F0F0D_8EAD_45C4_9B3F_5A64E71F7C8D
)"
  case "$raw_branch_name" in
    *$'\n'*|*$'\r'*)
      echo "Branch name must be a single line."
      return 1
      ;;
  esac

  branch_name="$(printf '%s' "$raw_branch_name" | sed -e 's/^[[:space:]]*//' -e 's/[[:space:]]*$//')"
  if [ -z "$branch_name" ]; then
    echo "Branch name is required."
    return 1
  fi
  case "$branch_name" in
    -*)
      echo "Branch name must not start with '-'."
      return 1
      ;;
  esac

  if ! git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Not in a Git repository."
    return 1
  fi

  validated_branch_name="$(git check-ref-format --branch "$branch_name")" || {
    echo "Invalid branch name: $branch_name"
    return 1
  }
  if [ "$validated_branch_name" != "$branch_name" ]; then
    echo "Branch name must be explicit and unambiguous."
    return 1
  fi

  git show-ref --verify --quiet "refs/heads/$branch_name"
  show_ref_status=$?
  if [ "$show_ref_status" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Branch '$branch_name' already exists."
    return 1
  fi
  if [ "$show_ref_status" -ne 1 ]; then
    echo "git show-ref failed"
    return 1
  fi

  main_branch="main"
  remote_name="origin"
  current_branch="$(git branch --show-current)" || return 1
  if [ -z "$current_branch" ]; then
    echo "Not on a branch."
    return 1
  fi

  update_main() {
    if ! git fetch "$remote_name" "$main_branch"; then
      echo "Could not fetch $remote_name/$main_branch."
      return 1
    fi
    if ! git show-ref --verify --quiet "refs/remotes/$remote_name/$main_branch"; then
      echo "Remote $remote_name/$main_branch was not found."
      return 1
    fi
    git switch "$main_branch" || return 1
    if ! git merge --ff-only "$remote_name/$main_branch"; then
      echo "main cannot be fast-forwarded from $remote_name/$main_branch. Resolve main manually, then retry."
      return 1
    fi
  }

  restore_stash() {
    stash_ref='stash@{0}'
    if git stash apply "$stash_ref"; then
      git stash drop "$stash_ref"
    else
      echo "Stash restore stopped. Resolve conflicts before continuing; the stash was kept as $stash_ref."
      return 1
    fi
  }

  if [ "$current_branch" = "$main_branch" ]; then
    if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
      echo "Local changes are on main; creating $branch_name before updating main."
      git switch -c "$branch_name" || return 1
      stashed=0
      if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
        git stash push -u -m "branch $branch_name from main" || return 1
        stashed=1
      fi
      if ! update_main; then
        git switch "$branch_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        if [ "$stashed" -eq 1 ]; then
          echo "Local work is preserved in stash@{0}."
        fi
        return 1
      fi
      git switch "$branch_name" || return 1
      if ! git rebase "$main_branch"; then
        echo "Rebase stopped. Resolve conflicts, then run git rebase --continue or git rebase --abort."
        if [ "$stashed" -eq 1 ]; then
          echo "Local work is preserved in stash@{0}; apply it after finishing or aborting the rebase."
        fi
        return 1
      fi
      if [ "$stashed" -eq 1 ]; then
        restore_stash || return 1
      fi
    else
      update_main || return 1
      git switch -c "$branch_name" || return 1
    fi
  else
    git switch -c "$branch_name" || return 1
  fi

  git status --short
}

git_new_branch
